objective: Continue the Orin NX engineering loop after final evidence closeout by running a narrow device-stage lifecycle/perf investigation under frozen Regular05 semantics.

entry_context.accepted_device_path: MMAPI/NVDEC block-linear NV12 main chain -> NvBufSurfTransform to pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch -> VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp -> NvBufSurfTransform back to block-linear NV12 -> NVENC
entry_context.completed_profile: Nsight/NVTX evidence shows wrapper/sync/transform/lifecycle cost dominates over vpiSubmitPerspectiveWarp.
entry_context.current_reason_to_continue: The final evidence package is sealed; the next engineering progress should test whether a narrow lifecycle/perf A/B can turn the profiling attribution into an additional measured result.

result.power_boundary: tegrastats activity evidence was collected, but hard board-input FPS/W was not produced because INA rail power was not collected in this loop.
result.decision: Promote stream-only reuse as a small accepted device-stage lifecycle optimization. Do not trigger queue-depth, double-buffering, zero-copy, or broad scheduler work.

frozen_variables: input source: Regular05 same-source boundary unless a new contract explicitly changes it
frame/FPS boundary: keep same frame-count and avoid mixed 25fps/30fps panels
crop/postprocess boundary: do not change quality semantics inside this loop
consumer path: accepted C++ EGLImage path, stream-only reuse candidate, or format-matched NvBuffer pair candidate
output must be readable and handoff fallback must stay zero
forbidden_routes: broad queue-depth or double-buffering rewrite without new idle-gap evidence

task_queue.title: Control-plane contract
task_queue.objective: Register this loop as the current active task and keep final evidence closeout as completed support.

task_queue.title: Nsight stage-budget attribution
task_queue.objective: Turn existing Nsight CSV exports into a stage-budget and actionability table.
success_criteria: NVTX and CUDA API costs are grouped
candidate optimization routes are ranked by measured cost and risk

task_queue.title: Candidate A/B selection
task_queue.objective: Select only the narrow candidates justified by P1 and existing lifecycle repeat evidence.
success_criteria: each candidate has one verifier and one stop rule
broad scheduler rewrite remains closed unless evidence changes

task_queue.title: Long-run lifecycle A/B
task_queue.objective: Run or prepare a same-source long-run repeat for accepted EGLImage, stream-only reuse, and/or NvBuffer pair.
success_criteria: same source and same matrix are used
stage/wall p50 or mean is reported
candidate is promoted only if improvement is stable and meaningful

task_queue.title: Device-stage perf-watt check
task_queue.objective: Collect or bound a device-stage power/perf result without changing system configuration broadly.
success_criteria: power source and sampling method are explicit
result is labeled device-stage, not full EIS pipeline perf/watt

task_queue.title: Negative-result closeout
task_queue.objective: If gains are low or unstable, record why a larger scheduler rewrite is not justified.
success_criteria: attempted candidates and observed gains are listed
next route is narrow or deferred

task_queue.title: Presentation and README sync
task_queue.objective: Update only final tables and wording affected by the new lifecycle/perf evidence.

task_queue.title: Long-term context maintenance
task_queue.objective: Update the allowed long-term context sections with concise conclusion, evidence path, and next-action boundary.

task_queue.title: Verification and git hygiene
task_queue.objective: Run control-plane checks and inspect git status/diff scope.
success_criteria: large artifacts and secrets remain untracked

candidate_thresholds.promote_to_result: A candidate should show stable device-stage or wall improvement around 3-5% or produce a clear new attribution insight without quality/readability regression.
candidate_thresholds.close_as_negative: Low-single-digit or unstable gains should be recorded as bounded evidence and should not trigger a broad rewrite.
candidate_thresholds.requires_new_contract: Any queue-depth, double-buffering, Remap C++ probe, or power-mode change requires a new scoped contract or explicit user direction.

stop_reasons: Jetson SSH or runtime blocker that cannot be recovered locally
new measurement requires manual hardware or sudo action that the user must perform
no actionable candidate remains after existing evidence and knowledge-base checks
